meta.tagline: Glenville NY inpatient + 6 outpatient locations · Capital Region
meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: 7-pin Map Pack ownership · organic CVR roughly doubled Q3 '25 → Q1 '26 · Plattsburgh template replication across 5 outpatient pages · service-page un-geo-lock · rating-lift review velocity · architectural cleanup.

yoy_fallback_html: YoY comparisons aren't meaningful here — Q1–Q2 2025 were the migration gap (near-zero traffic). See the quarterly trajectory below for the post-recovery picture: sessions softening as the older blog cluster loses rankings, but organic conversion rate roughly doubled (0.39% Q3 '25 → 0.94% Q1 '26) and form-submit lead volume held steady.
tldr: The past 6–9 months tell a quality story. Conifer Park now holds #1 or #2 in the Map Pack at all 7 locations — the Glenville flagship gained +19 top-10 grid cells Feb→Apr and Troy added +107 Apr→May. GBP / Maps clicks climbed from ~700/mo to a March peak of 1,099. Organic conversion rate roughly doubled (Q3 '25 0.39% → Q1 '26 0.94%) — form-submit leads have held nearly flat even as the older blog cluster softens, so each visit is doing more work. Watch points: avg rating 3.3★ across 7 pins (Schenectady 2.7★ × 10 and Rochester 2.7★ × 36 carry the drag; 3 pins still below the 4★ LLM-citation threshold) and non-brand blog traffic in post-migration decline. Plattsburgh is the proof template — only /outpatient/<city>/ URL with trailing slash + the only GBP pointing to its city page; pos 5.5 / 3.38% CTR. Q2 plan: replicate Plattsburgh across 5 outpatient pages (Troy+Schenectady M2, Glens Falls+Syracuse+Rochester M3), un-geo-lock 6 /service/*-in-glenville-ny pages, run the intake-side review-velocity SOP on all 7 facilities to lift the rating floor, kill architectural pollution (tel: URL spawning, case-sensitive duplicates, 71 suburb doorways, WordPress debris). HQDM GBP access scoped to Glenville Inpatient + Troy Outpatient only; 5 unmanaged pins covered via on-page rebuilds + off-page playbook + LD monitoring. Tracking note: form-submits are wired but phone-call clicks still live inside a generic click event (~1,995 / 90 days, 2–3× the form-submit count) — adding click_phone_number + gmb_click as conversion events in M1 would let the dashboard reflect the true lead volume.

kpis.label: Map Pack rank across 7 pins
kpis.detail: Glenville #1/12 anchors · Troy #1–2 · Schenectady #4 outpatient / #2 suboxone · Glens Falls #1 drug rehab · Plattsburgh #1 drug rehab + opioid · Syracuse/Liverpool #1 both anchors · Rochester #1 both anchors. Map Pack ownership is the working channel.

kpis.label: Avg rating across 7 GBPs
kpis.detail: Glenville 3.2★ × 153 · Troy 3.9★ × 27 · Schenectady 2.7★ × 10 · Glens Falls 3.9★ × 25 · Plattsburgh 4.2★ × 16 · Syracuse 3.4★ × 27 · Rochester 2.7★ × 36. 3 pins below 4★ threshold close LLM citation surface.

kpis.label: GBP/click conversion rate
kpis.detail: GA4 365d: gmb/click 7,656 sess → 190 conv (29% of all conversions from 6.2% of all traffic). 5.8× the Google organic rate (0.43%). This is the working channel — defend + extract.

kpis.label: Plattsburgh template gap
kpis.detail: Only Plattsburgh GBP points to /outpatient/plattsburgh/ city page (pos 5.5, 3.38% CTR, 612 clicks). The other 6 GBPs dump traffic on homepage. No UTMs on 7/7 pins → gmb/click invisible by location in GA4.

kpis.label: Service pages geo-locked
kpis.detail: All 6 /service/*-in-glenville-ny URLs locked to Glenville-only intent. Combined 79 clicks / 365d / 0 conv. NOT IN TOP 100 for Albany / Saratoga / Capital Region queries. Single-fix lever — drop the -in-glenville-ny suffix.

kpis.label: Architectural pollution
kpis.detail: 71 /suburb/* doorways with adjective-stuffed slugs (failed USGS GNIS validation on 4+). tel:8009896446 path-segment spawning at template layer. 4 confirmed case-sensitive URL duplicates (/OUTPATIENT/TROY etc). WordPress migration debris (/program/, /2013/, /author/matt) still indexed.

trend.headline: GA4 — sessions + conversions by channel, 18 months. Sessions softening in 2026 (blog cluster losing rankings); organic CVR roughly doubled across the same window. Conversion events tracked (90d): form_submit (241).
trend.annotation_text: GA4 default-channel-grouping. Conversions = sum of all events flagged as conversion in this property. Tracking gap: phone-call clicks are not yet a configured conversion — they currently fall inside a generic click event firing ~1,995× in the last 90 days, which likely contains the majority of true call volume. Adding click_phone_number and gmb_click as conversion events would bring the lead picture closer to reality.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first ~20 days of the month at trailing daily rate.

engagement_signals.annotation_text: Sessions arriving from Google Business / Maps listings. Climbed from ~700/mo to a peak of 1,099 in Mar '26 — the GBP surface is doing more work even as blog traffic softens.

positives: Map Pack ownership at all 7 pins (#1 or #2) — Glenville #1/12 anchors, Plattsburgh #1 drug rehab + opioid, Syracuse/Rochester #1 both anchors

Organic conversion rate roughly doubled across the post-recovery window — Q3 '25 0.39% → Q1 '26 0.94% (Q2 '26 partial trending higher). Form-submit leads held nearly flat through the same window even though blog sessions softened — each visit is doing more work
GBP / Maps clicks (GA4 sessions) climbed from ~700/mo (Q4 '25 baseline) to a peak of 1,099 in Mar '26 — the local-search surface is absorbing more of the demand
Glenville flagship gained +19 top-10 cells across 4 queries Feb→Apr 2026 — hardening (5–14× improvement-to-regression ratio)
Troy outpatient gained +107 top-10 cells across 5 queries Apr→May 2026 — branded local terms locked at #1–#2 across the entire 0.5-mi neighborhood grid
GBP/click converts at 2.48% (29% of conversions from 6.2% of traffic) — 5.8× the Google organic rate; this is the working channel
Plattsburgh is the proof template — only city-page URL with trailing slash + GBP pointing to city page; pos 5.5, 3.38% CTR, 612 clicks
Schema architecture already rich (global @graph: MedicalOrganization + 6× MedicalClinic + 4× MedicalProcedure) — refactor not rebuild
Returning Organic Search visitors convert at 1.71% (1.75× new-visitor rate) — brand-pull → return-visit pathway is highest-value flow
Capital District Recovery Center vacated Glenville SERP (-197 cells) — freed cells partially absorbed by Conifer (+19)
OASAS Operating Certificate #10018 (founded 1983, 225-bed Glenville facility, Liberty Behavioral Management parent)
negatives: Avg rating 3.3★ across 7 pins — Schenectady 2.7★ × 10, Rochester 2.7★ × 36 (worst rating × most reviews = biggest drag); 3 pins below 4★ LLM citation threshold
Only 1/7 GBPs (Plattsburgh) points to its city page; the other 6 dump on homepage. Zero UTMs on 7/7 pins → gmb/click invisible by location
6 /service/*-in-glenville-ny pages geo-locked to Glenville intent — pos 22–40 in GSC, NOT IN TOP 100 for Albany/Saratoga/Capital Region queries
Troy URL canonicalization backwards — /outpatient/troy is what Google indexes (438 clicks / pos 4.66) but 301s to /outpatient-rehab-troy-ny (0 traffic)
Rochester CRO catastrophe — 51,508 imp / pos 9.36 / 0.819% CTR (worst on the site) + 2.7★ × 36 rating drag = compounding affordability friction

Architectural pollution: tel:8009896446 spawning at template layer (dozens of indexed URLs) + 4 case-sensitive duplicates (/OUTPATIENT/TROY etc) + WordPress migration debris (/program/, /2013/, /author/matt)
71 /suburb/* adjective-stuffed doorway pages (4+ failed USGS GNIS — Honeywell Corners, Cedar Bluffs, Huntleigh, Harmony Corners) — March 2024 spam-policy exposure
GBP photo gap: 5/7 pins below 25-photo benchmark (Plattsburgh null, Troy 3, Glens Falls 3, Rochester 5, Syracuse 6, Schenectady 9). Plattsburgh also has null description
Trust-signal layer absent — no Joint Commission, CARF, LegitScript visible. Insurance payor list public-side missing. Competitive set (Mountainside/Hazelden/AAC) all carry visible accreditation
Glens Falls GBP title typo 'Glen Falls'; Rochester GBP secondary categories spam-tier (Coaching center / Fitness program); Syracuse GBP says 'Liverpool' while site says 'Syracuse'

levers.name: Plattsburgh template replication — 5 outpatient page rebuilds
levers.why: Plattsburgh ranks pos 5.5 / 3.38% CTR / 612 clicks because it's the only /outpatient/<city>/ URL with trailing slash + the only GBP pointing to its city page. The other 5 outpatient pages sit at pos 9.4–11.8 / 0.82–1.63% CTR — same Map Pack rank, very different on-page conversion architecture.

actions.name: Reverse Troy redirect — /outpatient/troy becomes canonical (1-hr fix, matches Plattsburgh pattern)
Audit /outpatient/troy post-redirect → rebuild only if thin (per §1c competitor pressure on 'outpatient rehab near me')
Rebuild /outpatient/schenectady (Suboxone/MAT anchor — beats New Choices #1 only if 2.7★ floor lifts)
Rebuild /outpatient/glens-falls + /outpatient/syracuse + /outpatient/rochester (3 pages, M3 cohort)
Rochester CRO diagnosis — GA4 funnel diff feeds SP-05 Rochester brief (51K imp / 0.82% CTR / 2.7★ × 36)

levers.outcome: 5 outpatient pages rebuilt to Plattsburgh template by M3 close. Each page-rebuild target: 2× CTR floor + 1 intake form + per-pin MedicalClinic schema. Plattsburgh untouched (proof template stays).

levers.name: Service-page un-geo-lock + site architecture cleanup
levers.why: 6 /service/*-in-glenville-ny URLs locked to Glenville-only intent (pos 22–40, NOT IN TOP 100 for Albany/Saratoga). Architectural pollution (tel: URL spawning, case-sensitive duplicates, 71 adjective-stuffed suburbs, WordPress debris) leaks the Maps win and exposes March 2024 spam-policy risk.

actions.name: Un-geo-lock 6 /service/*-in-glenville-ny → /services/* (network-wide service pages with areaServed NY)
Consolidate 4 cannibal URLs (/serving-all-of-troy-ny, /professional-outpatient-rehab-in-troy-ny-cornifer-park, /rochester-review, /liverpoolreview) → 301 to canonical
Suburb audit — 71-URL decision matrix sign-off (12 DELETE non-USGS, 59 NOINDEX adjective-stuffed)
Execute 71-suburb decisions + WordPress debris purge (/2013/*, /category/*, /author/matt, /admissions.html)
Page-level schema refactor — 16 URLs (per-page MedicalClinic / Service / Review, not global @graph everywhere)

levers.outcome: 6 service pages rank for non-Glenville Capital Region queries by M3. 71 suburbs + WordPress debris purged. Schema page-level specificity passes RRT on ≥80% of touched URLs.

levers.name: Glenville + Troy GBP build-out (HQDM-scoped pins)
levers.why: HQDM GBP Manager access is scoped to Glenville Inpatient + Troy Outpatient only (per Owner Item #1). Defensive Posts cadence + NAP fix + descriptions + services list + UTMs + photos = closes the cleanest GBP-side gaps. Glenville is hardening (+19 top-10 cells); Troy is climbing (+107) but Whitney M Young + Hope House Outpatient pushing into 'outpatient rehab near me' top-3.

Glenville GBP services audit (15+ existing → URL pointers to real /services/* pages post-SP-04)
Glenville GBP attribute completion + UTM landing repoint (gmb/click split by location in GA4)
Glenville GBP Posts cadence — 24 posts × 12 weeks (defensive)
Owner-reply to all 14 Glenville <4★ reviews (13× 1-star + 1× 2-star)
ExifTool keyword-injection on existing 26 Glenville photos (no new intake needed)
Troy NAP fix (2431 vs 2435 6th Ave — gated on Owner Ask #4) + GBP description build (~720 chars)
Troy GBP services-list build from scratch (currently 0 services) + UTM landing
Troy GBP Posts cadence — 24 posts × 12 weeks (offensive — competitive pressure)
Troy 'outpatient rehab near me' targeted defense vs Whitney M Young + Hope House Outpatient
Owner-reply to Troy <4★ reviews (per Reviews_Plan tab)
Troy photo blitz 3 → 25 (gated on Owner Ask #6 photo content) + ExifTool injection

levers.outcome: Glenville rating 3.2★ → 4.0★+ by M3. Troy NAP aligned + photos at 25 + 24 Posts shipped. gmb/click traffic splits by location in GA4 for the first time.

levers.name: Review velocity SOP across 7 facilities + LD monitoring infrastructure
levers.why: Avg rating 3.3★ across 7 pins is the single highest-leverage GBP lever — and it's HQDM-shippable only via intake-side workflow (not from outside the facility). LG-UP-06 deploys SMS + printed-QR card SOP at all 7 facilities (workflow doesn't require GBP Manager access). LD monitoring on 5 unmanaged pins (Glenville + Troy already baselined) closes the rank-tracking loop for the unmanaged pin work in Lever E.

actions.name: Review velocity intake-side SOP — 7 facility rollout (SMS + QR card; HQDM tooling, client distributes)
LD grid setup on remaining 5 pins (Schenectady + Glens Falls + Plattsburgh + Syracuse + Rochester)
Competitor watch list per §1b + §1c (Glenville rising threats: St. Peter's +132 / BriteLife +99; Troy threats: Whitney M Young +155 / Hope House Outpatient +99)
M3 Maps SERP re-pull at all 7 coords + LD grid compare vs baseline (win/hold/lose per pin)

levers.outcome: +15 reviews per pin M2-M3 target across all 7 facilities. <4★ % trends down on Schenectady + Rochester. Weekly LD scans landing for all 7 pins. M3 close-loop delta sheet per pin.

levers.name: Off-page (Embedinator + Cloud Page + Citations + Disavow) — site-side signal build
levers.why: Off-page signal build targets page URLs + GBP coords externally — doesn't require GBP Manager access. Narrowed to Embedinator (all 7 pins) + Cloud Page (3 weakest) + citation buildout on the 2 in-scope pins. SEO Neo / DAS / GBP Blast / Sniper / RD100 / AI Articles / NAP-overlay stack removed per 2026-05-13 program halt.

actions.name: Citation Tier-1 — Glenville + Troy on 5 surfaces (SAMHSA, OASAS, BBB, Apple Maps, Bing Places)
Citation vertical-SUD — Healthgrades + Psychology Today + Recovery.com + ShatterproofATLAS + Rehabs.com (Glenville + Troy)
Citation Tier-2 + local NY (Manta + Foursquare + Addictioncenter + Rehabspot + NY Combat Heroin)
Pitch contributed article to behavioralhealthnews.org (Capital Region SUD trends byline)
Psychology Today profile audit + completion (Glenville + Troy, clinician-roster gated)
Disavow file generation (toxic-links scan only) + GSC upload (gated on Owner Ask #8)

levers.outcome: 7 Embedinator stacks live. 3 Cloud Pages live for offensive pins. 30+ Tier-1/2 citations submitted (Glenville + Troy). Disavow file ready for client GSC upload.

levers.name: Content refresh + trust-signal close (no net-new blog content)
levers.why: Brand engine is the working surface (49.7% of clicks at 17.5% CTR). Top 5 high-impression blogs are the highest-leverage refresh targets: 'signs that my body is detoxing' (7,331 clicks / 528K imp), 'how long do alcoholics live' (5,094 / 241K), 'how long does kratom last' (2,617 / 653K). Trust-signal layer (Joint Commission / CARF / LegitScript / insurance payor list) absent — competitive YMYL gap.

actions.name: Top-5 blog refresh M1 — title rewrite + FAQ schema (kratom + alcoholics live + detoxing + acid spinal + alcohol kill)
Top-5 blog refresh M2 — contextual content + internal link cluster reinforcement
Top-5 blog refresh M3 — measurement + delta vs M1 baseline
3 supporting articles — MAT first appointment + Schenectady insurance + Rochester affordability
Trust-signal close — Joint Commission/CARF/LegitScript pursuit + insurance payor list (gated on Owner Asks #2 + #3 + #5)
Q2 close-out report — planned → executed → impact per task (% Reports With Full Correlation format)

levers.outcome: 5 blogs refreshed with 2026-stat updates + FAQ schema → CTR delta logged by M3. 3 supporting articles ship. Trust-signal status documented per badge; insurance payor list published on /admissions.

deliverables.label: Troy GBP Description Rewrite + NAP Fix
Outpatient Pages Plan (SP-02 / SP-03 / SP-05 rebuilds)
Cannibal Pages Plan (4 URLs × 301 or rewrite)
Service Pages Un-Geo-Lock (6 pages × new slug + 301)

owner_asks: CARF / Joint Commission / LegitScript / SAMHSA accreditation status — per badge: accredited? certified? what year/level? Gates TS-01 trust-signal close + LLM citation surface unlock.

Insurance payor list — full named list for inpatient (Glenville) and per outpatient location, plus any sliding-fee or self-pay program details. Gates Rochester rebuild (SP-05) affordability hook + /admissions conversion lift.

Troy address verification — GBP says 2431 6th Ave, site copy says 2435 Sixth Avenue. Which is ground-truth? Gates LG-TR-01 NAP fix + citation cleanup; Troy is on an upward momentum window we don't want NAP drift to confuse.

Sliding fee / self-pay program — does Conifer offer sliding fee at Rochester (or anywhere)? Detox scholarships? Self-pay package pricing? Gates Rochester rebuild hook against 2.7★ × 36 affordability friction.

Troy photo content — can client supply 25 interior + exterior + staff photos (no patient faces, with media-release approval)? Gates LG-TR-06 photo blitz (3 → 25); no HQDM photo stock currently exists for Conifer.

Intake-side review SOP — does intake/discharge team have a current review-request workflow? Can we deploy SMS + printed-QR card distribution at all 7 facilities? Gates LG-UP-06 (rating lift is the highest-leverage GBP move and can't be HQDM-shipped externally).
GSC access for sc-domain:coniferpark.com + disavow approval — who has GSC access? Can we get the OFF-06 disavow file approved + uploaded by M3 wk2?
Schema sign-off — any named clinical leadership to reference in OS-01 schema medicalSpecialty / Person blocks? Any specific awards/recognitions to surface in `award` properties?

5 unmanaged GBP ownership — Schenectady, Glens Falls, Plattsburgh, Syracuse/Liverpool, Rochester — pins are claimed but HQDM has no Manager access. Same domain, same brand, distinct AM. Flagged for Milica escalation if access becomes possible (Q3+).

Driving Directions program — OFF-07f Tier-0 tactic flagged for principal-level awareness per project_hqdm_tier0_exposure.md (Orlando regression-window: peak rank 3.44 → 7.54 ~8 weeks post-completion). M2 light cadence on weak pins only; no client ask.

gsc_organic_trend.headline: Branded share of clicks growing in short windows (85% 30d vs 50% 365d) — non-brand clicks decaying faster than brand. Blog informational mass losing rankings.
gsc_organic_trend.annotation_text: Source: GSC Search Analytics — daily 365d export aggregated to month. Brand engine (~17.5% CTR, 81K branded imp) stable; non-brand blog impressions (4.95M, 0.29% CTR) decaying. May 2026 partial (first 13 days).
gsc_organic_trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first 13 days at trailing pace.

snapshot.eyebrow: HQDM Search Intelligence · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.title: Conifer Park
snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · Capital Region NY · 7 locations · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: The last six to nine months tell a quiet but real quality story: Conifer Park now holds #1 or #2 in the Map Pack at all seven locations, the Glenville flagship gained +19 top-10 grid cells Feb→Apr, Troy added +107 top-10 cells Apr→May, and Maps clicks climbed from ~700/mo to a March peak of 1,099. Form-submit leads have held steady even as blog-driven organic sessions softened, lifting organic conversion rate from 0.4% (Q3 '25) to ~1.0% (Q1 '26). The watch point is the post-migration decline in non-brand blog traffic, which the Q2 plan directly addresses through Plattsburgh-template replication, service-page un-geo-lock, and architectural cleanup.

line.title: Organic Visitors + Leads · Monthly (Q4 2025 → Apr 2026)
line.caption: Sessions are softening as the older blog cluster loses rankings, but the lead line is roughly steady — meaning each visit is more likely to convert. Leads = form-submits; phone-call tracking is not yet wired (see note below).

snapshot.boxes_reading_html: Year-over-year comparisons aren't meaningful because Q1–Q2 2025 were the migration gap (near-zero traffic). The real story is in the post-recovery window: sessions are down because the old blog cluster is losing rankings, but leads have held nearly flat and the conversion rate has more than doubled — visitors are more qualified and the on-site funnel is doing more work per visit. May '26 is a partial month (asterisk).
